notes: KiCad-backed externally powered ESP32-WROOM-32E-N4 minimal-system pass fixture. Requires clean strict ERC/DRC, complete physical contact proof for local routes, writer correctness, and zero normalized schematic/PCB round-trip diffs. The PCB antenna exclusion is a hard all-copper-layer routing keepout aligned with the module's native KiCad footprint keepout.
